mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM comment WHERE member_id = #{member_id}

select c.*, m.nickname, case when c.board_id is not null then b.title when c.recipe_id is not null then r.title end as main_title,
case when c.recipe_id is not null then r.thumbnail else 'no_board.png' end as thumbnail
from comment c join member m on c.member_id = m.member_id left join board b on c.board_id = b.board_id left join recipe r on r.recipe_id = c.recipe_id where 1=1
and ( m.nickname like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or b.title like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') )
and c.status = #{status}
order by c.created_date ASC
order by c.created_date DESC
order by c.status desc
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
